description: Lecture discussing applications of multiplicative weights in algorithms, focusing on zero-sum games and linear programming. Covers the basics of the multiple weights algorithm and its guarantees in decision-making scenarios.
topic_summary: Explores multiplicative weights as a tool for deriving algorithms in games and linear programming. Discusses guarantees related to fixed and mixed strategies in hindsight, emphasizing the effectiveness of deterministic actions over randomized strategies [t=0:88].
